violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024

The floors and walls throughout the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
